title: Quest Handheld Steam Cleaner/Powerful Chemical Free Multi Surface Cleaner / 9 Cleaning Attachments and Accessories/Fast Steam Production/Child Lock/Green
features: .MULTI-FUNCTIONAL - This handheld steam cleaner is the perfect accessory to help you with the cleaning of kitchen appliances, clothes, upholstery, cars, bathrooms and any other unclean area around your house. This powerful steam gets deep into burnt on grease and food spills, to make cleaning cookers and ovens easy.

9 CLEANING ACCESSORIES -The Quest Handheld Steam Cleaner comes packed with 9 handy cleaning accessories which include Long Spray Nozzle, Round Brush Nozzle, Bent Spray Nozzle, Garment Steamer, Window Squeegee, Flexible Extension, Funnel, Measuring Cup and a Towel Sleeve.

NO CHEMICALS - The Quest Handheld Steam Cleaner requires no chemicals to produce a deep clean of any surface that needs attention. This makes it not only better for the environment but for your household appliances too.

COMPACT YET POWERFUL - The Quest Handheld Cleaner creates 1000W of power allowing for high pressure and top results. It stores 350ml of water which is capable of producing hot temperatures of up to 135° C.
QUEST APPLIANCES – Quest has everything you could possibly require for your home. From cooking utensils to cleaning appliances, look no further than the Quest store for the ultimate home accessories.
description: Product Description Multi-Purpose with 9 Attachments Handheld Steam Cleaner Clean all areas of your home quickly and thoroughly using this Handheld Steam Cleaner. Its compact, ergonomic design makes precise cleaning easy, and also has features built in for safety and convenience such as a child lock and a 2 metre long cable. Attachments include a long spray nozzle, a garment steamer, a squeegee, a brush nozzle, and more, emphasising the versatility of this useful cleaner. Previous page Precise & Powerful With 1000W of power & a max temperature of 135°C, the steamer thoroughly cleans almost any surface. Versatile Use The steam cleaner can be used on clothes, upholstery, cars, as well as in bathrooms, kitchens & more No Chemicals Needed The steamer doesn't need chemicals for a deep clean, making it safer & better for the environment. Safety Valve & Child Lock The cleaner's safety features include a child lock to prevent the accidental release of hot steam. 9 Accessories Included The steam cleaner comes with 9 different accessories for precise, specialised cleaning. Next page 1 Precise & Powerful 2 Versatile Use 3 No Chemicals Needed 4 Safety Valve & Child Lock 5 9 Accessories Included
